message:
refactor(web): migrate debug/health/session from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot

Replace std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex across the web
module, eliminating all .unwrap() calls on lock() and removing
poison propagation risk.

debug.rs: Update doc example to use parking_lot lock() API.
health.rs: All HealthCheck methods (register, set_ready, is_ready,
  run_checks, startup_handler) simplified by removing .unwrap().
session.rs: MemoryStore and Session methods (load, save, delete,
  get, insert, remove, clear, contains, len, is_empty, Debug)
  all simplified. SessionMiddleware handler also updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
